description: Determines the type of scheduled radio segment for the Moonlight Radio scenario. Roll when you get Scheduled Segment from the Hello Focus table.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the type of scheduled radio segment for the Moonlight Radio scenario. Roll when you get Scheduled Segment from the Hello Focus table.

entries.result: A Message From The Chief: This is a public service announcement your PC agreed to read from Police Chief Gibbons

entries.result: Lemur Tires And Motors: Your PC's show has a few local businesses that financially support it, including this auto mechanic. Roll on Conversation for inspiration about their services

entries.result: Hold On, Please: Something distracts your PC that causes a few minutes of dead air on the show. Maybe it's a sound outside, or a knock on the door. When your PC goes to check it out, there is nothing there
